tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: git diff HEAD | grep -E "^\+.*\.github_repo|^\-.*\.plans_repo" | grep -v "^---\|^+++" | head -30
Show plans_repo to github_repo renames in diff

session.tool_result: - ... plans_repo = config.plans_repo + ... github_repo = config.github_repo - if cfg.plans_repo: + if cfg.github_repo: - f" plans.repo={cfg.plans_repo}" - f"{' (local)' if local_only_config.plans_repo is not None else ''}" + f" plans.repo={cfg.github_repo}" + f"{' (local)' if local_only_config.github_repo is not None else ''}" - and not cfg.plans_repo + and not cfg.github_repo - if config.plans_repo is not None: + if config.github_repo is not None: - if repo_config.plans_repo is not None: - offer_plans_repo_label_setup(repo_context.root, repo_config.plans_repo) + if repo_config.github_repo is not None: + offer_plans_repo_label_setup(repo_context.root, repo_config.github_repo) - plans_repo = ctx.local_config.plans_repo if ctx.local_config else None + plans_repo = ctx.local_config.github_repo if ctx.local_config else None - plans_repo=repo_config.plans_repo, + github_repo=repo_config.github_repo, - local_config.plans_repo - if local_config.plans_repo is not None - else base_config.plans_repo + local_config.github_repo + if local_config.github_repo is not None + else base_config.github_repo - issues: GitHubIssues = RealGitHubIssues(target_repo=local_config.plans_repo, time=time) + issues: GitHubIssues = RealGitHubIssues(target_repo=local_config.github_repo, time=time) - if repo_config.plans_repo is not None: + if repo_config.github_repo is not None:
session.assistant: The agent is correctly renaming `.plans_repo` → `.github_repo`. The implementation looks good. Now let me check agent status again:
session.tool_result:
The branch has a large set of accumulated unstaged changes — 118 files modified or renamed in total, representing this whole phase of the rename campaign. The 4 renames in the staged area are from earlier work (the `plan_service` → `pr_service` directory rename). The 61 files modified in this session are all unstaged.
**Summary of current state:**
- **Branch:** `plnd/O9109-rename-plan-to-pr-ph-03-09-2222` - **Staged:** 4 files (the `plan_service/` → `pr_service/` directory renames from prior work) - **Unstaged modified:** ~114 files — a mix of prior work (already-updated excluded files listed in your task) plus the 61 files the LibCST agent just modified - **Working tree:** Clean otherwise, no untracked files
The refactoring session completed successfully. All attribute access and constructor keyword renames for the 6 target patterns (`plan_identifier`, `plans_repo`, `plan_id` on `PlanNotFound`/`CreatePlanResult`, `PlanNextSteps.plan_number`, and `plan_number`/`plan_url` on `CreatePlanDraftPRResult`) are done across 61 files. All modified files pass Python syntax checks. agentId: a36c2e70a827d43ff (for resuming to continue this agent's work if needed) <usage>total_tokens: 129641 tool_uses: 1 duration_ms: 19470</usage>
session.assistant: The background agent has completed! It modified 61 files. Now let me run a comprehensive verification to check what still needs to be fixed:

1→"""Tests for next_steps formatting functions.""" 2→ 3→from erk_shared.output.next_steps import ( 4→ PlanNextSteps, 5→ format_plan_next_steps_plain, 6→) 7→ 8→ 9→class TestPlanNextSteps: 10→ def test_construction(self) -> None: 11→ steps = PlanNextSteps( 12→ pr_number=42, 13→ url="https://github.com/org/repo/pull/42", 14→ ) 15→ assert steps.plan_number == 42 16→ 17→ def test_view_returns_url(self) -> None: 18→ steps = PlanNextSteps( 19→ pr_number=42, 20→ url="https://github.com/org/repo/pull/42", 21→ ) 22→ assert steps.view == "https://github.com/org/repo/pull/42" 23→ 24→ def test_dispatch_uses_plan_number(self) -> None: 25→ steps = PlanNextSteps( 26→ pr_number=42, 27→ url="https://github.com/org/repo/pull/42", 28→ ) 29→ assert steps.dispatch == "erk pr dispatch 42" 30→

80→ 81→ assert isinstance(result, PlanBranchSetup) 82→ assert len(result.warnings) == 1 83→ assert "is CLOSED" in result.warnings[0] 84→ assert "Proceeding anyway" in result.warnings[0] 85→ 86→ 87→def test_prepare_plan_converts_identifier_to_int() -> None: 88→ """Plan identifier string is converted to plan number int.""" 89→ plan = _make_plan( 90→ pr_identifier="789", 91→ header_fields={"branch_name": "plan-test-01-01-0000"}, 92→ ) 93→ timestamp = datetime(2024, 1, 1, 0, 0) 94→ 95→ result = prepare_plan_for_worktree(plan, timestamp, warn_non_open=True) 96→ 97→ assert isinstance(result, PlanBranchSetup) 98→ assert result.plan_number == 789 99→ assert isinstance(result.plan_number, int) 100→ 101→ 102→def test_prepare_plan_invalid_identifier_returns_failure() -> None: 103→ """Non-numeric plan identifier returns PlanValidationFailed.""" 104→ plan = _make_plan(pr_identifier="not-a-number") 105→ timestamp = datetime(2024, 1, 1, 0, 0) 106→ 107→ result = prepare_plan_for_worktree(plan, timestamp, warn_non_open=True) 108→ 109→ assert isinstance(result, PlanValidationFailed)
